overview: DBZ x cosmic-horror total conversion. A dead Saiyan universe bleeds into Hoenn as the Hollowed; the Cell Syndicate harvests trainer ki to wake a sleeping god. Mentor: Prof. Gohan. Rival: Vegeta.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The scouter on the dashboard blinks once, reads a power level of zero, and quietly dies.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: We're here. Littleroot. Far from the crater, far from the war. Breathe, my little Saiyan.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Whatever you felt on the sea... it's behind us now. It has to be.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The clock hands twitch backward for a heartbeat, as if time itself flinched from something.

dialogue.speaker: MOM
dialogue.line: Set it, sweetie. In this house, we decide when the hour comes. Not them.

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: HELP! It has my ki-reader! This thing isn't a Pokemon - it's Hollowed, it's been emptied out!

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: The bag! Grab a partner from my bag and fight - hurry, before it drains me to zero!

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: You saved me. That was no wild beast. It was a soldier, scooped hollow. We need to talk. Now.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Stop. Your power level... it's laughable. But it's real. Real is rare in this dead place.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Draw your partner. I'll measure what you are before the Syndicate does it with a blade.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Tch. You climb fast. Faster than a normal should. That's either hope or a symptom.

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: Enough, Vegeta. Route 102, then Petalburg. Norman is waiting - and he already knows what the child is.

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: Stop. Your power level... it's laughable. But it's real. Real is rare in this dead place.

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: Draw your partner. I'll measure what you are before the Syndicate does it with a blade.

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: Tch. You climb fast. Faster than a normal should. That's either hope or a symptom.

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: Enough, Vegeta. Route 102, then Petalburg. Norman is waiting - and he already knows what the child is.

dialogue.speaker: DEVON WORKER
dialogue.line: Help! A thief - black uniform, a red R on the chest! He took the KI-CORE! If MAGMA or AQUA learn we lost it, MR. STONE is finished. Please, get it back!

dialogue.speaker: DEVON WORKER
dialogue.line: He ran for RUSTURF TUNNEL. Strange... as he fled, he shouted 'We're SAVING you people.' What kind of thief says that?

dialogue.speaker: DEVON WORKER
dialogue.line: You got it back! You really are something... So why do I feel like we just did something terrible?

dialogue.speaker: DEVON WORKER
dialogue.line: MR. STONE insists on meeting you personally. Please, come with me. And... don't mention what the thief said. Please.

dialogue.speaker: MR. STONE
dialogue.line: So you're the one. You've heard the rumors - the crater, the cracked sky. This KI-CORE simply keeps the lights on, nothing more. Now, a small favor: deliver a letter for me. And if you ever hear the word KAIROS... forget it.

dialogue.speaker: MR. STONE
dialogue.line: Take this POKENAV as thanks. If the readings near MT. CHIMNEY ever spike... don't look up. Ha ha. A joke. Of course it's a joke.

dialogue.speaker: ROCKET GRUNT
dialogue.line: Back off, kid! TEAM ROCKET isn't robbing anyone today - we're REPOSSESSING doom. Do you even know what your precious DEVON feeds the mountain?

dialogue.speaker: ROCKET GRUNT
dialogue.line: Urgh... fine. We're thieves, not liars. Remember that later, when the sky goes quiet.

dialogue.speaker: ROCKET GRUNT
dialogue.line: Take the core. Deliver it like a good little courier. But when you finally hear the name KAIROS... remember that I tried to stop you.

dialogue.speaker: ARCHIE
dialogue.line: CAPT. STERN! TEAM AQUA will assume control of your submarine! Resist and regret it! ...And Maxie, if you're listening: the performance is right on schedule.

dialogue.speaker: SAILOR
dialogue.line: The HARBOR! They're taking the sub! But... I swear the AQUA thugs waved MAGMA men INTO the cargo hold. Did I imagine that?

dialogue.speaker: MAXIE
dialogue.line: So. The courier arrives at last. Yes, child - courier. Who do you think carried the third component up this mountain? Check your bag. KAIROS thanks you for your service.

dialogue.speaker: MAXIE
dialogue.line: The METEORITE was never for GROUDON - that fairy tale is for the cameras. It feeds the hungry silence beneath Hoenn. A future burned to nothing... unless we starve that future of ever happening.

dialogue.speaker: MAXIE
dialogue.line: Defeated... and it changes nothing. The delivery is already complete. You saw to that yourself.

dialogue.speaker: MAXIE
dialogue.line: TEAM MAGMA, TEAM AQUA - there are no teams. There is only the timeline, and the man rewriting it. WALLACE knows. GOHAN suspects. Ask them... which side YOU have been on.

dialogue.speaker: ARCHIE
dialogue.line: Go! Stop TEAM MAGMA! ...Say it louder, kid. The audience is watching.

dialogue.speaker: ARCHIE
dialogue.line: Thank you! You were magnificent. (He winks. Something is very, very wrong.)

dialogue.speaker: GATEKEEPER
dialogue.line: Badges? Yes, you have them all. But the ELDER asks a harder toll of you. Beyond this door, you decide what tomorrow is allowed to be.

dialogue.speaker: GATEKEEPER
dialogue.line: The seal is failing. KAIROS is already inside the LEAGUE. Believe in your partner - and choose as if the whole timeline is listening. Because it is.

dialogue.speaker: WALLACE
dialogue.line: Welcome, {PLAYER}. Sootopolis. The crater. The silence between seconds. I watched you carry all of it here. KAIROS reached this room before you did - and so did the elder's last breath. Show me which future your fists believe in.

dialogue.speaker: WALLACE
dialogue.line: I fall... and the room holds its breath. What happens next was never about me.

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: {PLAYER}! You're safe - and the readings... the readings finally make sense. Let me see your POKEDEX. Amazing. Creatures of two worlds, recorded side by side, as if they always belonged together.

dialogue.speaker: GOHAN
dialogue.line: Whatever you chose up here... my father used to say strength is just love with somewhere to be. Congratulations, champion. Both worlds are yours now.

dialogue.speaker: ROXANNE
dialogue.line: You came by the tunnel road... My GOLETT were excavated, not caught. Lately the fossils remember wrong - strata out of order, tomorrow buried under yesterday. Show me your discipline, courier of DEVON.

dialogue.speaker: ROXANNE
dialogue.line: Splendid. The STONE BADGE is yours. And a warning, from one scholar to one student: history is being edited. Check your sources before you trust them.

dialogue.speaker: BRAWLY
dialogue.line: Feel that? The tide's gone quiet. I train in the dark of GRANITE CAVE so the hollow can't take my center. Ki, they called it in the old world. Show me yours!

dialogue.speaker: BRAWLY
dialogue.line: Whoa - your aura hits like a wave! The KNUCKLE BADGE is yours. Keep your stance low when the sky goes silent, friend.

dialogue.speaker: WATTSON
dialogue.line: Wahahaha! My magnetic friends have been singing static all week - readings spike at dawn, flatline at dusk. Time hiccups, they tell me! Let old WATTSON test whether YOU are real!

dialogue.speaker: WATTSON
dialogue.line: Wahahaha! Beaten! You're real all right - realer than most of this town lately. The DYNAMO BADGE! May your current never read zero.

dialogue.speaker: FLANNERY
dialogue.line: The spring's gone cold. Grandfather's mountain smells like burnt tomorrow - ash that falls UP. I'm new at this, but my HOUNDOUR know an enemy when the wind changes. Let's see if it's you!

dialogue.speaker: FLANNERY
dialogue.line: You're... not the enemy, are you. Take the HEAT BADGE. And if you climb MT. CHIMNEY - don't trust anyone in a uniform. Either uniform.

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: ...You've grown. When we moved here, I promised your mother Hoenn would be quieter than Olivine. I was wrong. Whatever DEVON has you carrying - after this battle, we talk as father and child. First: show me everything I taught you.

dialogue.speaker: NORMAN
dialogue.line: ...Magnificent. The BALANCE BADGE - earned, not given. Listen to me. If a man named KAIROS ever offers you a kinder future... remember your mother and I chose THIS one. With you in it.

dialogue.speaker: WINONA
dialogue.line: My birds refuse the eastern sky. They circle MT. PYRE and scream at nothing. A flock has one mind - and that mind says the horizon is wrong. Prove you fly truer, challenger.

dialogue.speaker: WINONA
dialogue.line: Such grace... The FEATHER BADGE is yours. Take the eastern sky for me - and whatever my birds saw out there, land on the side of the living.

dialogue.speaker: TATE
dialogue.line: We dreamed you... LIZA: ...twice. TATE: In one dream you carry a bell... LIZA: ...in the other, a blade. BOTH: Which {PLAYER} are you today? Show us!

dialogue.speaker: TATE
dialogue.line: Even our combination... LIZA: ...couldn't split you in two. BOTH: The MIND BADGE! When the question comes at the LEAGUE... the dream where you carried the bell ended kinder.

dialogue.speaker: JUAN
dialogue.line: Elegance, at the end of the world? Especially then. Beneath this city sleeps a seal older than either universe - and my water whispers of cracks. Dance with me, challenger, while the floor still holds.

dialogue.speaker: JUAN
dialogue.line: Magnifique... The RAIN BADGE, and a truth: SOOTOPOLIS does not fear GROUDON or KYOGRE. It fears the silence wearing their names. Hurry to the LEAGUE.

dialogue.speaker: SIDNEY
dialogue.line: Heh. You smell it too, right? The world going hollow at the edges. And honestly? I LIKE it. No rules in a timeline nobody's writing. Come on - let's tear it up together!

dialogue.speaker: SIDNEY
dialogue.line: Ahahaha! Torn up by the best! You're the real thing, kid. Go on - the next room dreams darker than I do.

dialogue.speaker: PHOEBE
dialogue.line: My grandma at MT. PYRE says the ghosts are crowding lately. Refugees, she calls them - souls from a future that got erased. My friends and I keep them company. Will you?

dialogue.speaker: PHOEBE
dialogue.line: The ghosts like you... they're all pointing at the door. Grandma said to tell the bell-carrier: 'The seal knows your name.' I hope that means something nice!

dialogue.speaker: GLACIA
dialogue.line: I came from a distant land seeking cold that preserves. If time must end, let it end FROZEN - every moment kept perfect, like an insect in amber. Would that be so cruel, child?

dialogue.speaker: GLACIA
dialogue.line: ...Warmth wins. It always wins, and I always forget. Go - melt what he froze. And take my respect with you. It keeps.

dialogue.speaker: DRAKE
dialogue.line: Dragons remember what maps forget. Mine dream of a green one coiled around a wish - SHENRON, the old world called it. A dragon's oath outlives its timeline, sailor's honor. Show me YOUR oath!

dialogue.speaker: DRAKE
dialogue.line: By every sea I've sailed... your oath holds. The CHAMPION waits - and so does the question. Answer it like a dragon: with your whole life at once.

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: There you are! My scouter's tracked you since SLATEPORT - your readings keep climbing, and it worries me in a way I can't graph. Battle me. Data doesn't lie!

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: Off the charts... {PLAYER}, listen. The numbers put you at the center of whatever's coming. Please - be at the center of the GOOD part.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Courier. Your power grows - annoyingly. KAIROS's people whisper your name in two tenses. Draw your partner. I'll measure what the timeline wants with you.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Tch. Stronger than the measurement. Good. Whatever they made you carry... make them regret the delivery.

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: {PLAYER}! Don't move - the radar says something followed you in through the rain... gone now. Battle me. If you've gotten stronger, I'll worry less. That's how friendship math works.

dialogue.speaker: BULMA
dialogue.line: Stronger. Good. ...I decrypted the letter you delivered for DEVON. {PLAYER}... it was a list of names. Yours is third.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Still climbing, courier? The rain here falls a half-second late - the timeline is bruising. Fight me. I think better with my fists.

dialogue.speaker: VEGETA
dialogue.line: Hmph. The bruise deepens and you strengthen. Fine. When KAIROS asks his question - and he will - answer as a warrior. Not as anyone's courier.

dialogue.speaker: WALLY
dialogue.line: {PLAYER}! I made it - through the fog, through the whispers. When the hollow came for my RALTS, we drove it off TOGETHER. I'm not going to lose anymore! Not to sickness, not to silence - not even to you!

dialogue.speaker: WALLY
dialogue.line: I lost... but nothing about it is hollow. That's the secret, isn't it? Losing FULL. Go, {PLAYER}. The elder's bell... I can hear it ringing for you.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The ki-core powers the sub, powers the pumps, powers HIM. You didn't see us.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: We're not grave-robbing. We're grave-FEEDING. Big difference, smaller conscience.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The ghosts followed us from a future that never got to happen. Rude of them.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: Orb, shard, seal - it all goes down the same hungry throat.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The bell shard sings up here. It remembers a world that KAIROS ate.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: We're not grave-robbing. We're grave-FEEDING. Big difference, smaller conscience.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The ghosts followed us from a future that never got to happen. Rude of them.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: Orb, shard, seal - it all goes down the same hungry throat.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The bell shard sings up here. It remembers a world that KAIROS ate.

dialogue.line: We're not grave-robbing. We're grave-FEEDING. Big difference, smaller conscience.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The ghosts followed us from a future that never got to happen. Rude of them.

dialogue.line: Orb, shard, seal - it all goes down the same hungry throat.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: We're not grave-robbing. We're grave-FEEDING. Big difference, smaller conscience.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The ghosts followed us from a future that never got to happen. Rude of them.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: Turn back. The summit belongs to the counted dead now.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The shard's yours. Its silence isn't.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: Turn back. The summit belongs to the counted dead now.

dialogue.speaker: GRUNT
dialogue.line: The shard's yours. Its silence isn't.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We took the sub for the boss. Which boss? ...Good question. Wish I knew.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Aqua and Magma drink together now. Turns out the enemy was never each other.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Master ARCHIE says flood the world. KAIROS says empty it. Same wet grave.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We took the sub for the boss. Which boss? ...Good question. Wish I knew.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Aqua and Magma drink together now. Turns out the enemy was never each other.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We took the sub for the boss. Which boss? ...Good question. Wish I knew.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Aqua and Magma drink together now. Turns out the enemy was never each other.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Master ARCHIE says flood the world. KAIROS says empty it. Same wet grave.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Landlubber! This hideout's ours - and someone else's.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Blast it! Tell the tide I tried.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Master ARCHIE says flood the world. KAIROS says empty it. Same wet grave.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We took the sub for the boss. Which boss? ...Good question. Wish I knew.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Aqua and Magma drink together now. Turns out the enemy was never each other.

dialogue.line: Master ARCHIE says flood the world. KAIROS says empty it. Same wet grave.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We took the sub for the boss. Which boss? ...Good question. Wish I knew.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Aqua and Magma drink together now. Turns out the enemy was never each other.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Master ARCHIE says flood the world. KAIROS says empty it. Same wet grave.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We took the sub for the boss. Which boss? ...Good question. Wish I knew.

dialogue.speaker: AQUA GRUNT
dialogue.line: Aqua and Magma drink together now. Turns out the enemy was never each other.

dialogue.speaker: MAGMA GRUNT
dialogue.line: MAXIE preaches land. KAIROS preaches nothing - literally nothing, forever.

dialogue.speaker: MAGMA GRUNT
dialogue.line: We dig for the orb. We find only the same cold whisper, deeper down.

dialogue.speaker: MAGMA GRUNT
dialogue.line: You think we're the villains? Cute. We're just the ones who noticed first.
